nasb.text: My tent is destroyed, And all my ropes are broken; My sons have gone from me and are no more. There is no one to stretch out my tent again Or to set up my curtains.

esv.text: My tent is destroyed, and all my cords are broken; my children have gone from me, and they are not; there is no one to spread my tent again and to set up my curtains.

cnv.text: 我的帳棚毀壞， 我的繩索都折斷了； 我的兒女都離我而去，不在這裡了； 再沒有人支搭我的帳棚， 掛起我的幔子。

ccb.text: 我的帐篷已毁， 绳索已断； 我的儿女都离我而去， 再没有人为我支搭帐篷， 挂上幔子。
